qa_pairs.question: How can users access the Nibi cluster through a web browser?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can access the Nibi cluster through a web browser by using Open OnDemand (OOD). To do so, they should visit https://ondemand.sharcnet.ca/, sign in with multi-factor authentication (MFA), and they will be presented with options to open a Bash shell terminal or launch a remote desktop session.

qa_pairs.question: Is it possible to use JupyterLab on the Nibi cluster via Open OnDemand?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, JupyterLab can be run interactively on the Nibi cluster through its Open OnDemand (OOD) portal, which is available at https://ondemand.sharcnet.ca/.
